---
title: "Lesson 3: Workflow: Scripts"
author: "Nicky Wakim"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-color: "#3070BF"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: "../simple_NW.scss"
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    width: 1467
    height: 825
    footer: Lesson 03 Slides
    html-math-method: mathjax
    highlight-style: arrow
execute:
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

```{r}
#| label: "setup" 
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(here)
```

# Learning Objectives
